compiled_state.title: Implement FILE_IMPACT enum entries, state fields, and processor (2985-f04d)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Summary

Implement the FILE_IMPACT event type in ticket-lib.sh (both enum locations), add file_impact field to make_initial_state() and make_error_dict(), and add process_file_impact() processor plus dispatcher wiring in _processors.py.

## testing_mode
GREEN

## Story
2985-f04d — Add FILE_IMPACT event type to ticket-lib.sh and reducer

## Depends On
eaac-5eca (Task 1 — RED tests must be written and failing first)

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (TWO locations)
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_state.py
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_processors.py

## Implementation Details

### ticket-lib.sh — Location 1: _python_write_commit_event() ~line 75
Add FILE_IMPACT to enum case statement:
  case "$event_type" in CREATE|STATUS|COMMENT|LINK|UNLINK|SNAPSHOT|SYNC|REVERT|EDIT|ARCHIVED|FILE_IMPACT) ;;

### ticket-lib.sh — Location 2: write_commit_event() ~line 417
Add FILE_IMPACT to enum case statement (same pattern as Location 1).

### _state.py — make_initial_state()
Add 'file_impact': [] to the returned dict (alongside bridge_alerts, reverts).

### _state.py — make_error_dict()
Add 'file_impact': [] to the returned dict (parity with make_initial_state pattern established by bridge_alerts, reverts).

### _processors.py — new function
def process_file_impact(state: dict, event: dict, data: dict) -> None:
    state['file_impact'] = data.get('file_impact') or []

Note: uses 'or []' not .get('file_impact', []) — handles both missing key AND JSON null value.

### _processors.py — dispatcher in replay_events()
Add after the existing EDIT branch:
  elif event_type == 'FILE_IMPACT':
      process_file_impact(state, event, data)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests from eaac-5eca now pass GREEN
- [ ] poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py -x passes (all reducer tests including new ones)
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh passes
- [ ] No regressions in existing ticket reducer tests

## Done Definition
All 7 new tests pass. Both enum locations in ticket-lib.sh updated. Both state factory functions include file_impact field. process_file_impact wired into dispatcher.
